# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <table>
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td>
              "a"
        <tbody>
          <tr>
            <td>
              "b"
        <tfoot>
          <tr>
            <td>
              "c"
parse-errors: none
